# dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-githubaction.html): The entry point and execution orchestration layer for the GitHub Action environment. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.
- [InputParsing — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-inputparsing.html): Handles retrieving settings from action.yml via @actions/core Architecture documentation for the InputParsing subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [MarkdownTemplates — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-markdowntemplates.html): Generates the visual structure of the GitHub PR comment Architecture documentation for the MarkdownTemplates subdomain (part of Reporting domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Reporting Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-reporting.html): Processes and transforms raw analysis data into human-readable Markdown for PR feedback. Architectural overview of the Reporting domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.
- [ResultFiltering — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-resultfiltering.html): Applies ignore patterns and changed-file scopes to results Architecture documentation for the ResultFiltering subdomain (part of Reporting domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-supermodelsdk.html): Integration layer for interacting with the Supermodel dead code analysis API. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Testing Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-testing.html): The test suite and infrastructure for ensuring reliability of filtering and formatting logic. Architectural overview of the Testing domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [WorkflowRunner — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-workflowrunner.html): Coordinates the sequence of code analysis and reporting Architecture documentation for the WorkflowRunner subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [createZipArchive() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-index-ts-createziparchive.html): Architecture documentation for the createZipArchive() function in index.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [dead-code.test.ts — dead-code-hunter Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/file-src-tests-dead-code-test-ts.html): Architecture documentation for dead-code.test.ts, a typescript file in the dead-code-hunter codebase.

- [escapeTableCell() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-markdown-ts-escapetablecell.html): Architecture documentation for the escapeTableCell() function in markdown.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [filterByChangedFiles() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-dead-code-ts-filterbychangedfiles.html): Architecture documentation for the filterByChangedFiles() function in dead-code.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
